page_title: "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack Complete Album
text:
is the eighth soundtrack album containing music from the anime adaptation of Attack on Titan, compiling the previous three into a single album and featuring an extra Blu-ray disc that contains the orchestra concert footage from the Attack On Titan The Final Season SPECIAL EVENT 2022. It is composed by Kohta Yamamoto and .
